name: Non-Public Static Workbench Visual System Change Control v1
future_change_requirements: evidence ledger update only if claim added
no public route without separate public route governance
no engine/classifier/upload/scoring authorization without separate engine governance
required_future_validation: Python cache files must not be committed
non_authorization_statement: Change control does not authorize public routes, sitemap entries, public navigation, engine, classifier, upload, scoring, API, analytics, deployment, DNS, Cloudflare, custom domain launch, or public tool behavior.
